queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with borrowers lacking a checking account and their contribution to credit risk reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how a critical credit history or the presence of other existing credits functions as a credit risk driver that lowers default likelihood.
